recommendations.title: A Raisin in the Sun
recommendations.overview: Walter Lee Younger is a young man struggling with his station in life. Sharing a tiny apartment with his wife, son, sister and mother, he seems like an imprisoned man. Until, that is, the family gets an unexpected financial windfall.

recommendations.title: Fort Apache, the Bronx

recommendations.title: Lassie

recommendations.title: Arif V 216
recommendations.overview: After 8 years, Arif's old friend 216 from planet GORA pays a visit to Earth.Together they go on a quest where they'll be visiting 60's.

recommendations.title: Moon Man
recommendations.overview: Working as a maintenance crew member on the moon, Duguyue is left behind after the evacuation mission forgets about him. A meteorite then destroys planet Earth, leaving him as the only man left alive in existence.

recommendations.title: When Worlds Collide

recommendations.title: Don't Look Up
recommendations.overview: Two astronomers go on a media tour to warn humankind of a planet-killing comet hurtling toward Earth. The response from a distracted world: Meh.

recommendations.title: Bugonia
recommendations.overview: Two conspiracy obsessed young men kidnap the high-powered CEO of a major company, convinced that she is an alien intent on destroying planet Earth.

recommendations.title: Melancholia
recommendations.overview: Two sisters find their already strained relationship challenged as a mysterious new planet threatens to collide with Earth.

recommendations.title: Doppelgänger
